title: Legislative Decree No. 9 of 1984 Regarding the Central Population Registry
summary: Creates the legal basis for a central population registry and its specialisations, making it foundational for population data governance and national identity data management.

theme_notes.digital_government.digital_identity_trus: Legal basis for Bahrain’s Central Population Registry.

notes: Related instruments: Amended by Law No. 45 of 2006
